title: error: add BlobIntegrityMismatch variant
description:
Why: SHA-256 mismatch on download is a distinct security event (not a parse failure). Callers need to distinguish integrity failures from structural errors for security auditing and retry logic.

What: Add ClientError::BlobIntegrityMismatch { expected: String, actual: String } to error.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Add variant with #[error] attribute: 'blob integrity check failed: expected {expected}, got {actual}'
2. Add doc comment explaining this is non-retriable without re-fetching metadata
3. Run cargo check
acceptance_criteria: cargo check passes; variant is pub and accessible
